name: Stark
title: Warrior of the Journey Companions

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Chain Attack
basic.description: Stark swings his axe to attack. Deals Fire elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage.

core.name: Whirlwind Strike
core.description: Stark swings his axe while spinning. Deals Fire elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect.

skill.name: Spiral Strike
skill.description: Stark spins swiftly and swings his axe. Deals Fire elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. When the final hit lands it inflicts the [Airborne] effect.

skill.name: Lightning Strike
skill.description: Stark strikes forward with his axe in a powerful downward swing. Deals Fire elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. When this skill hits, it [Knocks Down] the target. Using this skill grants the user a [Shield]. Enhanced versions: Lightning Strike: Heavy Attack and Lightning Strike: Extreme Attack.

support.name: Warrior's Strike
support.description: After jumping towards the front, Stark performs a powerful downward swing using his axe. Deals Fire elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. When the final hit lands, it [Knocks Down] the target.

qte.name: Pulverize
qte.description: Stark charges forward rapidly, jumps, and delivers a powerful downward axe strike. Deals Fire elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. When this skill hits, it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, skills that inflict the [Stun] or [Bind] effects, or a Shadow Skill.

ultimate.name: Lightning Strike - Annihilation
ultimate.description: Stark descends from the air and strikes the ground powerfully with his axe. Deals Fire elemental damage. Deals almighty Break damage. When this skill hits, it inflicts the [Airborne] effect.

passive.name: Reserved / Confidence / Courage
passive.description: The user gains the [Reserved] effect when entering any stage. When Stark or an ally successfully puts an enemy into the [Break] state, the [Break] state duration increases by 3 seconds. The user's Power Gauge cannot be charged normally, but if the [Courage] effect is active, their Power Gauge gains 100% charge. [Reserved]: Using Spiral Strike, Lightning Strike, Lightning Strike: Heavy Attack, or Lightning Strike: Extreme Attack activates the [Confidence] effect and triggers Whirling Strike. [Determination] effect activates when Whirling Strike is used. When [Courage] is activated, [Reserved] is removed. Duration: Infinite. [Confidence]: Increases Fire damage by 3%, Defense Penetration by 3%. At max stacks (4), removed and [Courage] activates. Duration: Infinite. [Determination]: Increases Lightning Strike variants damage by 10%, Critical Hit Rate by 10%. Duration: 3s. [Courage]: Fire damage +20%, Defense Penetration +20%. [Confidence] cannot activate while active. When removed, [Reserved] reactivates. Duration: 5s.

advancements: [Fighting Spirit] effect activates when the user enters a story battle. When Whirling Strike hits it inflicts [Warrior's Aura] on the enemy (+15% damage taken from Stark, 15s). [Determination] enhanced: Basic Skill damage +15%, Critical Hit Rate +15%, Duration: 10s.
[Warrior's Aura] enhanced: damage taken from Stark +30% (15s). The entire team's Defense Penetration increases equal to 20% of Stark's extra base Defense Penetration stat.

Using Spiral Strike activates [Determination]. When Whirling Strike, Lightning Strike variants hit, they decrease the cooldown of Lightning Strike - Annihilation by 4s (Cooldown: 0.5s). [Confidence] enhanced: Fire damage +5%, Defense Penetration +5%, stacks up to 4 times. [Courage] enhanced: Fire damage +30%, Defense Penetration +30%, Lightning Strike - Annihilation damage +50%. Duration: 5s.
